choices.text: RTG (Radioisotope Thermoelectric Generator): Pu-238 decay heat → thermocouples → electricity. 5-300W; lasts 30+ years. Voyager, Cassini, Curiosity, Perseverance, New Horizons. Solar drops 1/r² — at Jupiter only 50 W/m².

questions.explanation: RTGs for deep space; solar fails 1/r².

choices.text: Li-ion batteries bridge eclipses. LEO orbit 90 min: 30+ min in shadow. Battery sized for max load × eclipse duration + margin. End-of-life degradation factored in (Li-ion 80-85% capacity after 10 years).
